title: ToolTreaux Eyelash Curler and Tweezer Set Eye Makeup Eyebrow Tool Set - 2pc
description:
Give your eyelashes and brows a natural, beautiful look with the ToolTreaux basic eye tool kit. This kit comes with one premium eyelash curler and tweezer to curl your eyelashes for a fuller look and to keep brows trimmed and shaped to your desired look. Both of these tools feature comfortable, ergonomic grip handles to provide support and prevent slippage during use to protect your eyes, lashes, and facial skin while tweezing and curling. The curler and tweezer are made of high-quality corrosion-resistant stainless steel that won’t rush so you can count on them to last. The set weighs just .09 pounds and will easily fit inside just about any purse, bag, or beauty tool kit, making this a great makeup tool set for on-the-go use

ToolTreaux Eyelash Curler and Tweezer Set Eye Makeup Eyebrow Tool Set - 2pc

Give your eyelashes and brows a natural, beautiful look with the ToolTreaux basic eye tool kit. This kit comes with one premium eyelash curler and tweezer to curl your eyelashes for a fuller look and to keep brows trimmed and shaped to your desired look.

Key Features

  • 2PC BASIC EYELASH TOOL KIT - ToolTreaux makeup tool kit comes with 2 professional tools for creating a natural, beautiful look; 1 premium eyelash curler and a set of eyebrow tweezers
  • ERGONOMIC HANDLES - Both tools feature comfortable, ergonomic handles to provide support and prevent slippage during use to protect your eyes, lashes and facial skin while curling and tweezing
  • PREMIUM DESIGN - Eyelash curler and tweezer are made of durable, high-quality corrosion-resistant stainless steel that won’t rust so you can count on them to last. Make sure to disinfect and dry them immediately after each use to ensure long service life
  • COMPACT AND LIGHTWEIGHT - Set weighs just .09 pounds and will easily fit inside any beauty tool kit, purse, or bag, ideal for on-the-go use; Keep inside your travel bag for quick touch-ups and stray hair removals if needed
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Material: stainless steel; Color: chrome; Number of pieces: 2 (eyelash curler and tweezer); Weight: .09 pounds (1.44 ounces); Ideal for professionals and beginners

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TTEYELSHTST2PC
  • UPC: 810058489500
  • Color: Chrome
  • Size: 2pc

Both of these tools feature comfortable, ergonomic grip handles to provide support and prevent slippage during use to protect your eyes, lashes, and facial skin while tweezing and curling. The curler and tweezer are made of high-quality corrosion-resistant stainless steel that won’t rush so you can count on them to last.

The set weighs just .09 pounds and will easily fit inside just about any purse, bag, or beauty tool kit, making this a great makeup tool set for on-the-go use. Keep them inside of your purse or travel bag for quick touch-ups and hair removals if needed!
